title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe is a background service that monitors agent context utilization; when threshold (>0.85) and min memories (≥3) are met, it summarizes each conversation-turn memory via LLM, computes local character 3-gram hashing vectors, filters by cosine similarity (≥0.3) to current conversation, and updates session.selectedMemoryIds, with cooldown (30s) and optional dependency injection.
